title: About
left_blurbs: ...who I am and what I do.
right_content: About Me. My name is Emanuel Eagle. I'm a developer and bird photographer.
I've been building things on the web for as long as I can remember. I enjoy working on projects that are useful, interesting, or both.
When I'm not coding, you'll probably find me outside with a camera, looking for birds. Photography has been a lifelong hobby that keeps me connected to the natural world.
